Dialog.name: MSG_000_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 1 0 0}This room feels so nostalgic, even though the entrance exams have only kept me away for a short while...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 3 0 0}The results haven't been posted yet... but I'm fairly confident that I passed.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 4 0 0}If that's the case, then this spring, I'll formally become a college student.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 5 0 0}...And that means I'll no longer be seeing this view.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 6 0 0}Unfortunately, I don't have much time to spare today. The company heads are conducting a briefing.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 7 0 0}The Kirijo Group may appear strong, but it's actually rather frail... It could collapse at any time.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 9 0 0}Heh... You're right. Resting is of equal importance.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 10 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}Still, this is a crucial moment for me. I'll accept that I may need to go a bit overboard.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 11 0 0}But if I do end up needing a change of pace, I hope you'll help me clear my head.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_005_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 12 0 0}Heh, of course. In fact, there's something that only you can do.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 13 0 0}Who else is going to help me clear my head when I need a change of pace?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 14 0 0}It's thanks to you that I learned to feel comfortable in my own skin, beyond my identity as a Kirijo.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_006_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 15 0 0}Before long, I'll be taking my leave from the dorm as well.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 16 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 3 25 25}I've begun packing up my things, but... I haven't made significant progress.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 3 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 17 0 0}My books, my clothes, my photos... Every one of them brings back memories.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 18 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}It's been a short, but eventful three years. It all went by so fast.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 19 0 0}Especially the year that you came.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_007_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 20 0 0}Whenever we spoke, or passed each other in the dorm... I felt like my heart would burst.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 21 0 0}I never knew I had these emotions just waiting to be given permission to be felt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_008_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 22 0 0}I wonder what would have become of me if you hadn't transferred to this school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 24 0 0}Would I have gone through with the arranged marriage?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 25 0 0}Or would I have gotten on my motorcycle and left it all behind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_009_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 27 0 0}Well, there's no point in dwelling on the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 28 0 0}There are things that need to be done—for the future of the Kirijo Group, as well as my own.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_010_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 32 0 0}Come introduce yourself to the heads of the family sometime. Don't worry, you'd only be saying hello.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 33 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}I'd just like them to know who you are.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_011_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 34 0 0}Well, it's almost time. I'd best be on my way.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 35 0 0}I'd love to see you back at the dorm, but I'll be out late tonight. Perhaps this weekend?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 37 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}Heh, who else will lend me their shoulder when I need a little support?[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 38 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}You're the only one who can do this for me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 1 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 39 0 0}Go on, try and name someone who could do the same.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_012_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 40 0 0}Heh, was that a bit much? Well, now you know how serious I am, {f 4 2}.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_013_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 43 0 0}It's hard to believe I've begun to feel like an ordinary high school student...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 44 0 0}I never knew I had these emotions just waiting to be given permission to be felt.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_014_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 45 0 0}I wonder what would have become of me if you hadn't transferred to this school...[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 47 0 0}I might never have realized what was truly important to me.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 48 0 0}Or would I have gotten on my motorcycle and left it all behind?[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_015_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 50 0 0}Well, there's no point in dwelling on the past.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 51 0 0}There are things that need to be done—for the future of the Kirijo Group, as well as my own.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 52 0 0}Even if I lose my way again someday... it doesn't matter.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 53 0 0}I know things will work out.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 54 0 0}I won't have to face it alone. You're the one who taught me that.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_016_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 55 0 0}All right, it's almost time. I must be on my way.[n]{f 1 1}

{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 56 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 1 25 25}Perhaps we could find some time to relax together on a weekend. I found a nice crêpe shop that I'd like to try.[n]{f 1 1}
{f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 0 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 57 0 0}{f 4 23 0 5 0 25 25}It's a bit far, though... You'd better get your motorcycle license soon.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_017_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 58 0 0}Just imagine hitting the road on our motorcycles together... I look forward to it.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MSG_018_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}{f 4 5 5 1 -1 -1 0 0}{f 3 1 1 0 0 59 0 0}...Well, we'll see. Now then, if you'll excuse me.[n]{f 1 1}
